scripts.install:all: npm run install:front && npm run install:back
scripts.install:back: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "cd back; py -m venv venv; .\venv\Scripts\activate; pip install -r requirements.txt"
scripts.dev:back: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "cd back; .\venv\Scripts\activate; py -m uvicorn app.main:app"
